title: Ender Pearl Sword
description: This Mod Adds a Sword which throws Ender Pearls on Right Click.
body:
This is 2nd little Mod.                                                                             
This Mod adds a Sword which Throws Ender Pearl on Right Click.                                                                                  
![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01827fa33f465368df6fadba53cea93b5db3e408.png)

This Sword has 11 Attack Damage and 1.75 Attack Speed.                                                      
The Ender Pearl thrown from this Sword has 1 Second Cooldown. (Same as Vanilla Ender Pearls)              
This Sword has same Durability as Netherite Sword.                                                           
The Recipe for Sword is given below :-                                                                      
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ef27d6bc855ecf126bdd1c2d29d6916448dcc4b_0.webp)        

Thats it for this Mod :D                                                                                  
Give Some Suggestions for more Simple and Practical Mods in My Discord Server Linked in Links Section.
Have Fun :)
